The strongest message from the Senate is not delay. It is durability.

CLARITY must be built carefully, passed decisively and made strong enough to support the next generation of digital markets.

The question is no longer whether it passes, but when. https://t.co/udi2PHOPOy

$30 billion tokenized.

$270 trillion still waiting.

The RWA opportunity is not about finding a new market. It is about bringing the world’s largest existing market onchain.

IXS is building the regulated infrastructure, vaults and yield rails to make it happen. https://t.co/OJpIqMg4MI

RT @BNBCHAIN: Welcome @IxsFinance to the BNB Chain ecosystem!

The IXS Agentic Vault brings institutional RWA-backed yield to AI agents on…

No complex routing. No fragmented infrastructure. No compromise between accessibility and regulated issuance.

This is what happens when agentic execution meets real-world yield with @labs_compass

The RWA Vault model is like an Oreo:

→TradFi at issuance.
→DeFi in the middle.
→TradFi at redemption.

KYC controls who enters and exits, while the asset remains programmable and composable onchain.

Regulated at the edges. Permissionless at the core. https://t.co/JHi7iGfTPY

The same will happen with tokenisation.

Today it is called “RWA adoption”. Soon it will simply be how assets are issued, traded and put to work.

AI changes who uses financial infrastructure. Tokenisation changes the infrastructure they use.

We're building for both!
RT @labs_compass: Agents now possess the elite infrastructure they deserve. Compass lets your agent earn, borrow, trade perps and RWAs whil…
The future isn't just onchain finance. It's autonomous finance. ⤵️⤵️

The $12M in RWAs matters more than the $4B in DEX volume. Trading brings attention; tokenised assets are what can make Robinhood Chain structurally important.

Thats what we are watching

AI agents → earn
AI agents → hold capital
AI agents → allocate capital
AI agents → using vaults

At that point, they’re not tools.
They’re participants in the economy.

This is where things change. This is what we are building for! https://t.co/1CVltioph4

→ $433M in 24h DEX volume flipping Hyperliquid
→ ~$100M TVL in week one
→ Stock tokens live in 120+ countries
→ USDG (~$2.9B supply) as the native stablecoin

Our regulated RWA vaults are ready to run on all EVM chain.....
https://t.co/aA5o8VdBUp

They move through custodians, structure, and settlement.

RWA adoption is not about rip…

The Third Wave report is out.
The roadmap ahead is mapped.
The Compass Labs integration is live.

And there is much more coming.

Join CEO @julian2kwan as he unpacks what IXS has shipped, where it is heading next, and takes https://t.co/LL8hNWiqUv

Join here ⤵️⤵️
https://t.co/02PA1MFHsI

Agents can deposit into our BNB Chain vault using natural language, gaining exposure to BlackRock’s SHYG ETF.

Open access. Licensed issuance. Wallet-signed execution. No Compass custody.

https://t.co/UnNCLQC5FH

In June, we published the thesis.

Now the demand is showing up.

tweets.text:
a16z frames it nicely: "Building for institutions requires understanding procurement, compliance, controls, channel partners, and long sales cycles."

Institutions are reconfiguring DeFi around exactly those constraints, keeping the primitives that fit and rebuilding the rest.

JPMorgan's new tokenized money market fund holds $693 million about two months after launch, driven largely by stablecoin issuers. The GENIUS Act bars them from paying interest on their tokens, so they park reserves in regulated onchain funds that earn it instead.

Regulated https://t.co/6b8TTyyMcE

Forbes reported that the tokenized asset market has reached roughly $60 billion, with most of it sitting idle onchain.

Tokenizing an asset is the first step. Putting it to work requires institutional credit rails.

$CPOOL https://t.co/uJ822xiOrz

RT @coinbureau: 🚨NEW: EU SET TO EXPAND MiCA RULES TO TOKENIZATION & STABLECOINS

The European Commission is reportedly preparing to expand…

RT @swissarmysteven: Prime crossed $10M in active loans this week.

In this market, slow and steady is the kind of growth we want.

Prime active loans just crossed $10M 🙌🏻

Permissioned, KYC and AML compliant access to a global network for wholesale borrowing and lending.

$CPOOL https://t.co/O5mY6kv3el

Onchain lending coming to the XRP Ledger.
Bringing institutional credit rails to networks where real capital already lives 👀

$CPOOL
Japan just approved RLUSD for launch via SBI. The compliant money layer keeps expanding across Asia, and that settlement base is what institutional onchain credit is built on.

US regulators are moving to require stablecoin issuers to run customer identification programs. Six agencies, including the Fed, OCC and FDIC, advanced KYC rules under the GENIUS Act this month, with final regulations due by July 18.

Know-your-customer is becoming the baseline

Bernstein report this week: tokenized RWAs at $51B, up 40% YTD, despite the broader crypto market falling.

Private credit is the largest category at 47% of the total.

Institutional interest in tokenization is accelerating independent of crypto market conditions.

Step by step,

Prime active loans just crossed $5,000,000 🙌🏻 

The institutional demand for permissioned onchain credit is here.

$CPOOL https://t.co/0lD1F7vbvA

Clearpool is live on @XDCNetwork. Now XDC-native institutions can tap into Clearpool's credit markets directly⚡️

More to come.

$CPOOL https://t.co/wjPkhfbTqI

Citi just published their Tokenization 2030 report.

Key takeaways:
- $17B today, $5.5T by 2030 (base case). Bull case $8T - Five asset classes drive the call: public equities, US treasuries, private credit, private equity and real estate funds.
- Stablecoins hitting $1.9T is https://t.co/Nfx84xc24H

Prime is back and we're just getting started. Just crossed $2,000,000 in active loans ⚡️

Permissioned, KYC & AML compliant access to the largest global network for wholesale borrowing and lending.

$CPOOL https://t.co/ntoucp3eKp

Clearpool Prime is back 🙌🏻
The product built for how institutions actually borrow.

$CPOOL https://t.co/JYGY7rpDqO

Clearpool has joined @XDCNetwork as an institutional Masternode Validator 💥

XDC has already processed over $1B in tokenized trade finance and real-world assets, and we're bringing credit infrastructure with $930M+ in originated loans to that ecosystem.

Clearpool will run https://t.co/nb7GRorHx5

X-Pool is growing and just crossed $2.5M in deposits💥 

Earn a 6-15% APR on USDC, USDT, USDX and RLUSD.  

Built w/ @Hex_Trust markets.

$CPOOL https://t.co/dpCJ9x2VxT
@Hex_Trust https://t.co/B7trSOU6D0

The stacks are converging.
One step closer to 24/7 markets.

⚡Clearpool launches the new X-Pool vault, built with @Hex_Trust markets.

Earn 6% annualized on stablecoins with a dynamic booster up to 15% APR.

No directional token exposure. No speculative DeFi loops. Returns are sourced from on-/off-ramping financing, stablecoin trading https://t.co/TIcJ1j5yQN

grok_brief.one_line: Clearpool advancing institutional RWA credit rails; Prime loans hit $10M, XDC live, X-Pool at $2.5M deposits amid $60B tokenized assets growth.

If you’ve been wondering what’s happening behind the scenes, this update is for you.

We shared a detailed look at Phoenix hardening, DuskEVM audit and performance work, Dusk Trade, developer tooling and improvements across the stack.

Read the full update ↓
https://t.co/sr58qOyelX

Native issuance can make raising and deploying capital more efficient.

Instead of tracking an asset across disconnected systems, ownership, trading, settlement, dividends and shareholder votes can run on one onchain rail.

Fewer duplicated records. Fewer operational handoffs.

Native issuance unlocks the full financial lifecycle onchain.

Global listed equities are worth around $150T, while onchain real-world assets total just ~$30B.

Much of today’s tokenization still places a digital wrapper over the same old system.

Over the past 50 years, markets https://t.co/lPii7hNnEs

A public position is information another trader can use against you.

Imagine a fund slowly buying shares in a company. If every purchase, position size, wallet, and counterparty is visible, the market can map the fund’s strategy before it finishes.

Other traders can move first.

Tokenized securities need more than a wrapper.

Putting an asset onchain does not automatically improve the regulated-market workflow.

The asset still needs rules for:
- who can hold it
- how transfers are checked
- what stays confidential
- what must be disclosed
- who can

RT @HouseofChimera: AI will make traditional job descriptions completely obsolete.

@Autholykos, CEO of @DuskFoundation, on the shift to “p…

Tokenization gives an asset an onchain representation.

Native issuance brings more of the lifecycle onchain, including issuance, transfer rules, settlement, review, and servicing.

Dusk provides infrastructure capable of carrying that lifecycle for regulated asset workflows.

DuskEVM connects Dusk to the EVM economy without leaving institutional privacy behind.

That expands Dusk in two directions:

- EVM compatibility gives builders a familiar way in.

Dusk has no official token or contract on Solana.

Any token on Solana presenting itself as DUSK is unofficial and is not issued, endorsed, or affiliated with Dusk. Do not buy, swap, bridge, or interact with it.
